free_text: -THE AVERAGE NEUTRON TOTAL CROSS SECTION OF B-10
FROM 100EV TO 10MEV AND ABSORPTION CROSS SECTION
BOOSTER NEUTRON TARGET OF ELECTRON LINAC.
IMPURITIES WERE C (0.7 PC), SI (0.8 PC), AND
TIME OF FLIGHT, 300M FLIGHT PATH, DETECTORS
NEUTRON BURST  140 NSEC, CHANNEL WIDTH 125 NSEC.
SURROUNDING AN ALUMINIUM CAN CONTAINING  B-10
AND 5 INCH DIAMETER, 250 GM THICK AT 300M,
MIXED WITH EQUAL VOLUME OF VASELINE.
480 KEV GAMMAS FROM LI-7 WERE COUNTED.
.CORRECTION MADE FOR B-11, BACKGROUND, C AND SI
.DERIVED FROM FIT TO ENERGY DEPENDENCE OF THE
MEASURED TOTAL CROSS SECTION GIVING A CURVE
CROSS SECTION THE SCATTERING CROSS SECTION
FROM A SMOOTH FIT TO MOORINGS DATA, NP,82,16,1966.
